title: [Release] 1.7.1 cherry-pick branch + PR + tag
description: Once TASK-037/038/039 land on release/v1.8.0-stabilization, cherry-pick those 3 commits to a new release/v1.7.1 branch from main, push, open PR to main, tag v1.7.1, npm publish (or relevant publish flow). 1.7.1 is deprecation-only — no code removal.

files.change: git checkout main && git checkout -b release/v1.7.1; git cherry-pick <TASK-037 commit> <TASK-038 commit> <TASK-039 commit>; git push -u origin release/v1.7.1; gh pr create --base main; bump packages/*/package.json + root package.json to 1.7.1; tag v1.7.1; publish
Move 1.7.1 unreleased section to released; date stamp

criteria: release/v1.7.1 branch contains exactly the 3 deprecation commits
PR opened to main with clear description
After PR merge: tag v1.7.1; package versions bumped; published
